Package telluii.util

package telluii.util
  • Class
    Description
    BoundedValue
    Represents a numeric value bounded between minimum and maximum limits.
    Clipboard
    Utility class for clipboard operations with support for both system and local buffers.
    Debugger
    Debugging utility class for managing debug mode settings.
    Debugger.TextConfig
    TextConfig is a class containing settings for text drawing.
    Environment
    The Environment class provides information about the system.
    Environment.Mode
    Mode is an enumeration representing the available environment modes.
    MathUtils
    Utility class providing mathematical helper functions.
    Metrics
    Metrics collection utility for tracking object creation statistics.
    SpatialState
    Represents a spatial state consisting of position (x, y) and dimensions (width, height).
    Timer
    Timer utility for tracking progress between two end-points over time.
